instruction: On May 31, 2020, during the time range from 03:00 to 03:30, there was a single failure in the system. The root cause component, the exact root cause occurrence time, and the underlying reason are currently unknown. You are tasked with identifying the root cause component, the root cause occurrence datetime, and the root cause reason.
scoring_points: The only root cause occurrence time is within 1 minutes (i.e., <=1min) of 2020-05-31 03:17:00
